images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunning, young Japanese gravure idol radiating a dangerous, edgy allure inside a retro telephone booth. She wears a form-fitting, cropped white ribbed tank top that hugs her ample chest and slim waist, paired with a classic red and black plaid shirt casually tied around her hips, framing her curves. The scene is illuminated by the cool, bright glow of the phone booth's screen, casting a sharp, modern clarity on her flawless skin texture, visible pores, and large, innocent yet seductive eyes. She gazes directly at the camera with an innocent expression that hints at mischief, leaning slightly against the glass. The background blurs into a creamy bokeh of the city's nighttime neon lights. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, Kodak Portra 400 color grade, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, hyper-detailed.8k photo, Large breasts
